question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's S&P 500 3-Month Volatility Index have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/VXVCLS once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-02-01 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-01-22) was 21.280. (The latest value released in CBOE S&P 500 3-Month Volatility Index from the release CBOE Market Statistics.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: Copyright, 2016, Chicago Board Options Exchange, Inc. Reprinted with permission..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Index.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Daily, Close
